common.error_desc: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
common.copyright: © 2026 VeriVote Secure Systems. Democratic Integrity Guaranteed.

landing.title: Secure. Transparent.
landing.description: VeriVote leverages advanced cryptographic verification to ensure every vote is counted exactly as cast.

verifiable.title: End-to-End Verifiable
verifiable.desc: Verify your vote was recorded correctly and included in the final tally without revealing your choice.

immutable.title: Immutable Ledger
immutable.desc: Powered by distributed ledger technology to prevent any unauthorized modification of election results.

access.title: Universal Access
access.desc: Vote securely from anywhere in the world, ensuring every citizen's voice can be heard.

auth.title: Secure Vote
auth.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue
auth.error: Invalid email or password. Use admin@a.com, voter1@v.com, or voter2@v.com with password "q".

dashboard.title: Active Elections
dashboard.subtitle: Cast your vote in ongoing democratic processes.

voting.error: Failed to cast vote. Please try again.
voting.selectCandidate: Select your preferred candidate for this position.

results.title: Platform Analytics
results.subtitle: Real-time overview of platform activity and democratic participation.

security.title: Security Protocol
security.subtitle: How we protect the integrity of every single vote.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.desc: Every vote is encrypted from the moment it leaves your device until it is counted. This ensures that only authorized systems can access the vote data.

ledger.title: Immutable Ledger
ledger.desc: We use blockchain-inspired technology to create an immutable record of all votes. Once a vote is cast, it cannot be altered or deleted by anyone, including administrators.

identity.title: Identity Verification
identity.desc: Our multi-factor authentication and identity verification protocols ensure that every voter is who they say they are, preventing duplicate voting and identity theft.

privacy.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs
privacy.desc: We verify that your vote is valid without ever seeing who you voted for. This maintains complete anonymity while guaranteeing the integrity of the count.

audit.title: Auditable & Transparent
audit.desc: While individual votes are anonymous, the entire system is designed for public auditability. Anyone can verify that the final count matches the sum of all encrypted votes without compromising voter privacy.

accessibility.readerEnabled: Screen reader enabled. Press space to navigate elements.
